text: So guys we have completed 100 days of code and what an experience it was I never thought that I would be able to put videos for 100 days But I took the challenge, many challenges came, I got many reasons Not to put a video of 100 days of code on any day But this thing used to come to my mind If the challenger is not going to start, if the challenger is broken My motivation was somewhere that I have to stay focused on my challenge Motivation, whatever your motivation is, if your work is done and you progress because of it Then it's positive and absolutely right, there is nothing wrong in it Now what I will do here quickly is that where to go from here I will tell you about this So many people ask that now we have done 100 days of code python Where to go from here, where to go here, what to learn, what to become How to earn money, how to find jobs, let's talk a little about this First of all, you have done 100 days of code python If you have done this 100 days with me Then there is a chance that some topics will be very weak, you may not have understood So the first thing you have to do is to make projects Now a new playlist of projects is coming very soon on this channel But I will say that don't wait for it You start making your projects I have already put a lot of projects So you go and search python project And open it on my channel and search python project When you write code with arry python project, you will get a lot to see And from there you can start learning things Now I have given you a resource of kinter Now what is kinter, it is used to make GUI in python So you can come to this homepage of kinter and learn kinter from here You will learn and be able to do things very easily After this, if you want to learn machine learning So there is a very good playlist for motivation This is a playlist by google developers It is a very good thing, Josh has told very well How does machine learning work And you can use pip install, scikit learn very easily You can easily train classifier by using the packages of machine learning What is classifier, what is regressor, these are all concepts of machine learning And how is machine learning done in python You can learn all this very easily Then there is a module called pytorch If you are in machine learning or data science So let me tell you from the starting what are the things In data science, you learn numpy to some extent And learn pandas to a larger extent Learn a lot of pandas You will get help in handling big data You will know how you can parse your data Then after knowing all this, what do you have to do Go to scikit learn and tensorflow Because data science and machine learning go hand in hand You can never say to yourself I will learn data science but I will stay away from machine learning No, see hand in hand You should both come And it is not that you are learning machine learning You are saying that I have no interest in data, I only know machine learning Learn both data science and machine learning hand in hand Don't waste too much time on this What is the difference between ML, DL, DS Learn the concept of pandas Pandas is a library If you don't know And it helps in data analysis in python Now some people will say Why not do this in javascript Why not do it in C or C++ This level of library is not in javascript I am giving you this statement Not yet You do not get this level of data analysis Now this book This is a very good book I have read this book And I learned pandas from this So go and buy this I am not putting any link here You buy it according to your own And it is a very good book I am giving you this statement Buy it from amazon.in This is amazon.com Python for data analysis By Wes McKinney I have not mentioned it here But I saw it so I told you She teaches pandas very well And if you read this, your life will change I have no interest in selling this book I am not giving any affiliate link But you can buy it It is a little Get this book anyhow And pdf I don't know where you are getting it from I don't know Buy it and learn it So this is a book And its name is hands on machine learning Everyone should have these two books Machine learning with scikit learn and tensorflow Machine learning with scikit learn and tensorflow Yes I know it is a little expensive book I know that But again it is a different level book It is fun Now in this, they keep updating The author is a very good book for machine learning He upgraded in 2019 I have this version But now he has upgraded it again in 2022 And what do they do in this
